name: meimberg
description: Meimberg's curated Claude Code plugins — own agents/skills plus vetted forks from the community.

plugins.name: review
plugins.description: PR review agents: silent-failure-hunter (error handling), code-reviewer (CLAUDE.md-aware, confidence-scored), comment-analyzer (doc accuracy). Vendored from anthropics/claude-plugins-official.

plugins.name: jira
plugins.description: Jira workflow skills: jira-setup (one-time per project), then specify → implement → commit. Config lives at .claude/jira.json.
